author: copilot
body: The Coworker Memory CLI is a repo-native institutional memory system for Enterprise Architecture work.
title: Phase 2 smoke entry concurrency-safe

author: copilot
body: The retrieval stack has three layers: SQLite FTS5 BM25 lexical search, local Model2Vec semantic similarity, and optional graph-aware expansion or reranking. Hybrid retrieval merges candidate sets with reciprocal-rank fusion or a documented equivalent, and each result must explain whether it came from lexical match, semantic match, or graph expansion.
title: cwmem retrieval architecture

author: copilot
body: cwmem uses SQLite at .cwmem/memory.sqlite for operational queries, FTS, graph storage, metadata, rebuilds, and verification. It exports deterministic artifacts under memory/ so state remains reviewable in Git and can round-trip back into SQLite without drift.
title: cwmem storage model

author: copilot
body: The confirmed v1 defaults are: vendor the small Model2Vec model in the repository by default, export entries as markdown plus JSONL plus manifest, ship inferred graph edges in v1, emit lifecycle events automatically for entry mutations, and keep sync export explicit by default rather than automatic after each write.
title: cwmem v1 defaults

body: Lexical search should find this capability model sentence.
title: FTS Baseline Entry

author: copilot
body: Phase 5 adds entity-add, link, related, graph, inferred shared-entity edges, and opt-in --expand-graph search.
title: Phase 5 knowledge graph implemented
